zh.lifeSummary: 當Kristina Sverkersdotter於1185年出生時，她的父親Kung Sverker den yngre Karlsson22歲，母親Benedikta Ebbesdotter Hvide19歲。她於大約1200年與Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1248年5月20日享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Kristina Sverkersdotter于1185年出生时，她的父亲Kung Sverker den yngre Karlsson22岁，母亲Benedikta Ebbesdotter Hvide19岁。她于大约1200年与Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1248年5月20日享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kristina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a feminine form of Latin Christianus ( see Christina ). Queen Kristina of Sweden ( 1626–89 ) succeeded her father Gustavus Adolphus in 1632 . Growing to adulthood, she presided over a glittering court, but in 1654 she abdicated, left Sweden dressed as a man, converted to Roman Catholicism, and lived for most of the rest of her life in Rome.

variants.name: Christina
meanings: Simplified form of Latin Christiana, feminine form of Christianus ( see Christian ), or a Latinized form of Middle English Christin ‘Christian’ (Old English christen, from Latin).

en.lifeSummary: When Kristina Sverkersdotter was born in 1185, her father, Kung Sverker den yngre Karlsson, was 22 and her mother, Benedikta Ebbesdotter Hvide, was 19. She married Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg about 1200. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 20 May 1248, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Kristina Sverkersdotter est née en 1185, son père, Kung Sverker den yngre Karlsson, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Benedikta Ebbesdotter Hvide, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg environ 1200. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 mai 1248, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Kristina Sverkersdotter 1185 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Kung Sverker den yngre Karlsson 22 und ihre Mutter Benedikta Ebbesdotter Hvide 19. Sie hat um 1200 Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Mai 1248 im Alter von 63 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Kristina Sverkersdotter è nata il nel 1185, sua padre, Kung Sverker den yngre Karlsson, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Benedikta Ebbesdotter Hvide, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg circa 1200. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 20 maggio 1248, all'età di 63 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Kristina Sverkersdotter(이)가 1185년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Kung Sverker den yngre Karlsson(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Benedikta Ebbesdotter Hvide(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1200년 Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1248년 5월 20일 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Kristina Sverkersdotter родилась в 1185 г., её отцу по имени Kung Sverker den yngre Karlsson было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Benedikta Ebbesdotter Hvide, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg около 1200 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 20 мая 1248 г. в возрасте 63 лет.

th.Mecklenburg, Nordwestmecklenburg, Meckle: เมคเลนเบิรก, ดอรฟเมคเลนเบิรก, คริสนอรดเวสตเมคเลนเบิรก, เมคเลนเบิรก-วอรพอมเมอรน, ประเทศเยอรมัน
